Title: Register new user with valid details
Preconditions: User is on https://demowebshop.tricentis.com ; user is not logged in
TestData: First Name=Test; Last Name=User; Email=unique email; Password=Password@123
Steps: 1) Click Register from top menu. 2) Select Gender if available. 3) Enter First Name and Last Name. 4) Enter unique Email. 5) Enter Password and Confirm Password with same value. 6) Click Register button.
ExpectedResult: Registration succeeds; success message 'Your registration completed' is shown; user appears as logged in with account email in header.

Title: Search product and open correct product details
Steps: 1) Enter 'laptop' in search box. 2) Click Search. 3) From search result, click '14.1-inch Laptop'.
ExpectedResult: Search results page shows relevant products; selected product details page opens; product name, price, add-to-cart button are visible.

Title: Add multiple products to cart and validate quantity/line totals
Preconditions: User account exists and is logged in
TestData: Product A=14.1-inch Laptop qty 1; Product B=Build your own cheap computer qty 2
Steps: 1) Add Product A to cart with quantity 1. 2) Add Product B to cart with quantity 2. 3) Open Shopping Cart. 4) Verify both products are listed. 5) Validate line subtotal for each product equals Unit Price x Quantity.
ExpectedResult: Both products are present in cart with selected quantities; each line subtotal calculation is correct; cart is ready for checkout.

Title: Complete checkout using valid billing/shipping/payment details
Preconditions: User is logged in; cart contains at least one product
TestData: Billing: US, New York, 123 Main St, 10001, 1234567890; Shipping method=Ground; Payment method=Cash On Delivery (or default available)
Steps: 1) Open Shopping Cart and click Checkout. 2) Accept terms of service if prompted. 3) Fill billing address and continue. 4) Select shipping method and continue. 5) Select payment method and continue. 6) Confirm order.
ExpectedResult: Order is placed successfully; confirmation page displays 'Your order has been successfully processed!'; order number/details are visible.

Title: Validate order total equals sum of line items plus shipping/tax adjustments
Preconditions: User is logged in; cart has 2+ products
TestData: Use products with visible prices and quantities; note subtotal/shipping/tax values shown in checkout/cart summary
Steps: 1) Add multiple products with known quantities. 2) Capture each line subtotal in cart. 3) Capture cart summary values (Sub-Total, Shipping, Tax, Total). 4) Calculate expected total manually = Sub-Total + Shipping + Tax (minus discounts if any). 5) Place order and compare final total on confirmation page.
ExpectedResult: Displayed totals are mathematically correct across cart, checkout summary, and confirmation page; no mismatch between computed and displayed payable amount.
